applied_optimizations.name: FP8 prefill radix-cache integration
applied_optimizations.description: Added FP8 prefill attention support for the radix-cache code path in aiter_backend.py. Changes: (1) Created mla_fp8_prefill_attn helper method that encapsulates mla_prefill_ps_asm_fwd + mla_reduce_v1 calls; (2) Fixed init_forward_metadata to use kv_indptr from mla_indices_updater instead of qo_indptr for PS metadata; (3) Fixed total_s to use seq_lens_sum instead of extend_seq_lens.sum(); (4) Added FP8 prefill path in radix-cache branch using fused_gemm_afp4wfp4_split_cat via kv_b_proj tuple-dispatch; (5) Refactored no-prefix path to use the shared helper; (6) Added import for fused_gemm_afp4wfp4_split_cat.

next_moves: Stage 2: Verify with actual model inference that FP8 prefill is active with radix cache
Benchmark FP8 prefill vs BF16 prefill with radix cache to measure throughput improvement
notes: Key insight: The human PR refactors shared FP8 prefill logic into mla_fp8_prefill_attn helper method
init_forward_metadata had a bug where qo_indptr was passed as kv_indptr to make_mla_prefill_ps_meta_data
total_s computation was wrong: used extend_seq_lens.sum() instead of seq_lens_sum (the latter includes prefix tokens)
fused_gemm_afp4wfp4_split_cat is triggered via kv_b_proj tuple-dispatch pattern (5-tuple with fp8_dtype)
